Event: Magic Well - December 2023
Event Date: 01/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: AR221


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Horned Sniper Gear

For the duration of the battle, the fighter cannot be disarmed.

Once in a while, the fighter steals 50% from the enemy fighter with the highest damage for 5 sec. When the effect ends, disarms the target of the ability for 3 sec. During this time, enemy fighter cannot use the weapon's abilities.

Requirements: 98-100
